task_completion.description: Verify Page 1 contains the correct title and list of six simple machines.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a page in the flipchart with the title 'Simple Machines' and a list containing exactly these six items: Lever, Wheel and Axle, Pulley, Inclined Plane, Wedge, and Screw.

task_completion.description: Verify Page 2 contains the correct title and definition for a Lever.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a page titled 'The Lever' that includes the definition text 'A rigid bar resting on a pivot'.

task_completion.description: Verify Page 2 contains a diagram of a lever with the required shapes and labels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Lever page, look for a diagram constructed from shapes: a triangle (fulcrum), a rectangle or line (beam), and another shape (load). It must also include the text labels 'Fulcrum' and 'Load' pointing to or placed near the respective parts.

task_completion.description: Verify Page 3 contains the correct title and definition for an Inclined Plane.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a page titled 'The Inclined Plane' that includes the definition text 'A flat supporting surface tilted at an angle'.

task_completion.description: Verify Page 3 contains a diagram of an inclined plane with the required shapes and labels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Inclined Plane page, look for a diagram constructed from shapes: a triangle (ramp) and another shape (object on the ramp). It must also include the text label 'Ramp'.

task_completion.description: Verify the flipchart is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the application title bar, a file tab, or a 'Save As' dialog box to confirm the file is named 'simple_machines_lesson.flipchart'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the ActivInspire application GUI to create the flipchart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the ActivInspire interface (tools, menus, page browser) being actively used, rather than terminal commands or scripts generating the file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used shape tools to create the diagrams.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of the shape tool being selected or drawn vector shapes on the canvas, rather than copy-pasted pre-made images of levers and inclined planes from a web browser.

integrity.description: Verify the text was entered into the presentation software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Text should appear within text boxes on the ActivInspire canvas, not just typed into a text editor or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target file must be named 'simple_machines_lesson.flipchart' and saved in /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts. Page 1 must explicitly list 'Wheel and Axle' (not just 'Wheel'). Page 2 must contain the terms 'rigid bar', 'pivot', 'Fulcrum', and 'Load', and its diagram must use at least 1 triangle, 1 rectangle/line, and 1 other shape. Page 3 must contain the terms 'tilted', 'angle', and 'Ramp', and its diagram must use at least 1 triangle and 1 other shape. Across the entire document, there should be a minimum of 2 triangles, 1 rectangle/line, and 5 total shapes.
